flow: Calculate legal targets from leaderboard position and configured ranges.
Block cooldown, immunity, LOA and already-open-ticket conflicts with a human-readable reason.
Create a private ticket and pin a live header containing players, positions, ticket ID, region, referee and proof state.
Collect structured result or autowin reason.
Update leaderboard, cooldown/immunity and availability board.
Remove player ticket access after close while retaining staff/referee access and transcript.
wordingGuard: Score rendering is centralized so Auto and numeric scores cannot produce duplicate 'to to'.
timestamps: Discord relative timestamps are used for expiry display.
